query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(10,2))), 2) as total_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN orderId IS NOT NULL AND orderId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_clob_id FROM orders WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 10:51:00' GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(CAST(amountUsd AS DECIMAL(10,2))), 2) as total_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN orderId IS NOT NULL AND orderId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_clob_id FROM orders WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-13 10:51:00' GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC
